title: morphompm: a differentiable morphoelastic growth-MPM for soft / living matter
description: A Material Point Method solver for morphoelastic growth (F = Fe*Fg) with hand-written, finite-difference-gated adjoints, enabling differentiable inference of material and growth laws from an observed deformation. Verified along three independent axes (finite-difference gradient gates, a forward-physics oracle, and a confined-swell analytic oracle) with numpy/C++ cross-implementation parity, and fully reproducible from a single command.
